## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] **Functionality** — implements the feature / fixes the issue
- [ ] **Architecture** — sound and consistent with project patterns
- [ ] **Code quality** — follows standards and best practices
- [ ] **Performance** — efficient under expected load
- [ ] **Security** — no vulnerabilities or data-protection concerns
- [ ] **Maintainability** — well-structured and self-documenting
- [ ] **Test coverage** — appropriate unit / integration / e2e tests
- [ ] **Documentation** — comments and docs complete and clear

## Author checklist

- [ ] Title follows [Conventional Commits](../references/git/git-commit-conventions.md)
- [ ] Single-purpose; large changes split into smaller PRs
- [ ] Automated checks pass
- [ ] `INDEX.md` and the relevant `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for document changes)
